NAVAREA XIX 156/23
 BARENTS SEA
 1.AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION
 DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL

 B. 75-20.0N 024-40.0E
 C. 74-50.0N 021-40.0E

 E. 76-30.0N 022-00.0E

 2. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 272230 NOV 23
